title: GeOre
body:
This mod takes heavy inspiration of the vanilla amethyst geode feature and applies it to other valuables to. The idea is that if you want to make ore farms you will need to go out and explore the world and try to find the geode of the ore you are looking for, these geodes work like vanilla geodes as to where it generates a decent chunk of decorative blocks and some budding versions of this block, the budding version will grow ore crystals which you can harvest when fully grown. budding ore blocks will not drop when mined even with silk touch, these can't be moved with pistons either, so where you find it is where you have to use it.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco

  -ShyNieke
